details.narrative: Maren Ashwick, Thornwick's last Wardweaver, died three weeks ago. The village has no one to lead the Binding Song.
The Thinning Forest edge has advanced 200 meters closer to Thornwick this season. Thin places are forming in ring 2 territory.

narrativeHooks.description: The Hollowing — the most important ceremony of the Wheel of Binding — is 42 days away. Without a Wardweaver, the ceremony will fail and Thornwick's ward-circle will collapse.
